question_text: Which of the following statements about the Sun is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The Sun is a planet that orbits Earth

options.label: B
options.text: The Sun is a star at the centre of our solar system

options.label: C
options.text: The Sun is a moon that orbits Mars

options.label: D
options.text: The Sun is the smallest object in the solar system

correct_answer: B) The Sun is a star at the centre of our solar system
explanation: The Sun is a massive star made of hot gas that sits at the centre of our solar system. All the planets, including Earth, orbit around the Sun because of its gravitational pull.
